# Prism Blog (LLMs Full)

## Zone
- Name: blog
- Base path: /blog
- Purpose: Blog content zone for Prism.

## Public routes
- /blog
- /blog/index
- /blog/posts/hello-multizone
- /blog/posts/advanced-routing

## APIs
- /blog/api/search
  - Method: GET
  - Query params:
    - q (optional): text search query
  - Behavior:
    - Returns JSON with matching blog pages/posts based on title, route, and keywords.

- /blog/api/og
  - Method: GET
  - Query params:
    - title (optional): heading text in generated OG image
    - section (optional): subheading text in generated OG image
  - Behavior:
    - Returns a 1200x630 PNG Open Graph image.

## Metadata and SEO
- Metadata is configured in the blog app layout and per-page metadata is provided for key pages.
- Canonical blog homepage URL path: /blog
- OG image path pattern: /blog/api/og?title=<...>&section=<...>

## Search index scope
Current blog search includes:
- Prism Blog (/blog)
- Blog Index (/blog/index)
- Hello Multizone (/blog/posts/hello-multizone)
- Advanced Routing (/blog/posts/advanced-routing)
